locations.name: 古希腊语
locations.summary: 古希腊语（阿提卡方言: Ἑλληνικὴ γλῶττα，伊奧尼亞方言 / 多利亞方言：Ἑλληνικὴ γλῶσσα） 指公元前9世紀至公元前4世紀所有以口头及书面为载体的古希腊语族的方言，時間上包括公元前9世纪至公元前6世纪的古風时期，…

locations.name: 菲律賓島嶼列表
locations.summary: 菲律賓是一個島國，由7,641座島嶼組成，大約可分成北部的呂宋、中部的米沙鄢群島、南部的棉兰老岛三個島群。以下依三個區域分類，列出菲律賓的主要島嶼。 呂宋 巴丹群島 巴布延群島 呂宋 波利略島 卡坦端內斯島 馬林杜克島 民都洛 卡拉棉群島…

relations.subject: Philippine scops owl
relations.evidence: nigrorum) were formerly considered conspecific but are now classified as separate species. Distinguishing features of these birds include their large upright ears from which they get their specific name megalotis, Ancient Greek for "large ears". Philippine scops owls are relatively small, sedentary birds that are naturally found in the forest understory. There are three subspecies which show variations in morphology and are distributed among different islands of the Philippine Archipelago

relations.subject: Philippine scops owl
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
